headline: Chemiluminescence Immunoassay Market by Product, Technology, Sample Type, Application, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The chemiluminescence immunoassay (CLIA) market is expected to grow from USD 11.58 billion in 2026 to USD 16.39 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 7.2%. Key drivers include the rising demand for accurate diagnostic tests for chronic and infectious diseases like cancer and cardiovascular disorders, along with automation and high-throughput testing advancements. The consumables segment is projected to lead due to frequent use in laboratories. Oncology applications are set to expand significantly, drive
